titleStmt.title: SII 26.85: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 85. (A.R. No. 82 of 1909.) TIRUVĀṈMIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Tripurasundarī-ammaṉ shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.

This fragmentary inscription contains a portion of the praśasti of the king and records a gift of money and paddy for offerings, evidently to god Mahādēva of the place, and the undertaking given by the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple. Details not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Beginnings of the lines are lost.tirttateṟipuṇal(ṟ) kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭalnaṭuvuḷ palakalañceluttic caṅkirāmaviContinuation of the lines is lost.
ppaṭutturimaiyilp piṟakkiya perunetip piṟakkamum Ārttavaṉ nakanakap�
ṅkaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟaicirvicaiyamum tuṟainirpaṉṉaiyum naṉmalaiyū
cokamum kāppoṟuniṟai punal māppappāḷamuṅ kāvalampuricaiy mevalipaṅkamu
ṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmuṟik kaṭun=tiṟal Ilāmuritecamum
koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī rājendracoḻa
vārttu kuṭuttom tiruppatiyamu viṇṇa caiyu
tevatāṉa

murmutalparivāra meṭṭaṉukkuc caruvoṉṟinukku Arici nāḻiuBeginning is lost.
ḻakkākac caruveṭṭiṉukku Arici kuṟuṇiirunāḻikkiraṭṭi I- ppatak
kenānāḻiyāka nāḷeḻiṉikku I- k kalane Aiṅkuṟuṇinānā
ḻiyum paliiṭa nāḷoṉṟinuk karici nānāḻikku I- k kuṟuṇiyāka nāḷeḻinu
kku I Ēḻukuṟuṇiyum Ōmattukkuc caruvukkarici Irunāḻiuriyāl I Aiñnā
ḻiyāka nāḷeḻinukku I tūṇiirunāḻiyum homañ ceyvānoruva
ṉukku nāḷoṉṟinukku I kuṟuṇiyāka nāḷeḻinukku I Eḻukuṟuṇiyun=tiruviḻaā
eḻun=taruḷundevaṟkuttiruvamirtu paṭioṉṟinuk karicinānāḻiyāka nāḷ muṉṟi
nuk karici kuṟuṇinānāḻikkañ patakkiru
nāḻiyum neyyamirtu kaṟiyamirtu tayiramirtu Aṭaikkāyamirtumāka nāḷonṟi
nukku I kuṟuṇiyāka nāḷeḻinukku I Eḻukuṟuṇiyum homattuppori
kkum porituṟumpattukkum nāḷonṟinukku I Irunāḻiyum homattu
kku ney yuri nāḷonṟukku I- ppatakku homadravyattukku nāḷonṟinukku
ḷa kuṟuṇiyumāka nāḷonṟinukku ḷa mukkuṟuṇiirunāḻiyāka nāḷeḻinukku ḷa
lane Irutūṇippatakkaṟunāḻiyum bherikkiḻaṭṭa ḷa mukkuṟuṇiyum yākacālai
yiṟ pradhānakalacaṅkaḷaṭikkiḻaṭṭu ḷa tūṇiyu meṟpaṭi kalacattiṉ kiḻaṭṭa Arici I
ḷa nānāḻiyum Astradevaṟku Irukālacan=tikku Arici nānāḻikku ḷa kuṟu
ṇiirunāḻiyāka nāḷeḻinukkirutūṇiaṟunāḻiyu miyākadevaṟku sandi Iraṇ
ṭinuk karici nānāḻiyinukku ḷa kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyāka nāḷeḻinukku ḷa Irutūṇia
ṟunāḻiyu n=tirumulastānattāḻvāṟku miḷayamādeviśvaramuṭaiyāṟkum paṭiyi
raṭṭiyāka neyyamutu kaṟiyamutu tayiramutu Aṭaikkāyamutuḷḷiṭṭu muṉceykiṟa pa
ṭi nāḷonṟinukku I Irukalanekuṟuṇi muṉnāḻiuriyāka nāḷeḻinukku Ipa
tināṟkalane Irutūṇippatakkuriyum pālikaik kiḻaṭṭavu n=tiruccuṇṇamiṭi
kkumiṭattin kiḻaṭṭa I tūṇippataṟku n=tiruviḻā Eḻun=taruḷuñciṟappuk
koṭṭu māḷ pattinukku 2kaccaṉ talaippaṟaikoṭṭi Oruvanukku nā
ḷoṉṟinukku ḷa kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyu mattaḷikoṭṭuvā raivaṟkuContinuation is missing.
Immaṇṭa(ṭa)lattu paiyyūr koṭṭattu Aracūr nilai
cellūr veḷāḷaṉ kumaṇa la ceṭṭikaḷāna[jaya]
van=taveḷāṉiṭai poliyūṭṭāka koṇṭa kācu O ttu Ikkācu 2 10 kkum ma
marakkālāl nellu Irutūṇikuṟuṇi ḻiyumāka
nel Inellu Eṇ(k)kalane Irunāḻikkum
tiruvamutu Arici nānāḻikku nel ḷa kuṟuṇiirunāḻiyum tayiramutukku ḷa
kku Inānāḻiyum Añcukku I
Continuation is missing.
tukku ḷa muṉ
nāḻiyum tiru
vārātaṉai
ceyvārkku ḷa
muṉnāḻiyu
māka Uvā
tta teva
rkku Idharmmaca
ndrātityavaṟ
muṭṭāmai
ceyyakkaṭa(ṭa)vo
mānom ci
va brāhmaṇa
rom Ivar
kaḷ colla
Eḻutineṉ
kāśyapaṉ
peṟṟam paṭṭa
neṉ Idha
rmmam panmā
heśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
